action.name: Crash Training Run

effect.raw: Advance one CL immediately, ignoring T cap. M +3 (corner-cutting penalty).

action.rawMarkdown:
## F01: Crash Training Run
- **Faction:** OpenBrain, DeepCent
- **Cost:** 6 K + 12 C + 3 T
- **Effect:** Advance one CL immediately, ignoring T cap. M +3 (corner-cutting penalty).
- **Flavor:** *"They burned through three months of compute reservation in two weeks. The Pre-Training Lead wrote in his Slack status: 'on fumes; will sleep when GPUs sleep.'"*
action.flavor: They burned through three months of compute reservation in two weeks. The Pre-Training Lead wrote in his Slack status: 'on fumes; will sleep when GPUs sleep.'

action.name: Algorithmic Breakthrough

effect.raw: Roll 1d10. On 7+: next Frontier Push costs 30% less Compute. On 1-2: nothing.

action.rawMarkdown:
## F02: Algorithmic Breakthrough
- **Faction:** OpenBrain (req. T ≥ 30), DeepCent (req. T ≥ 25)
- **Cost:** 5 K + 5 T
- **Effect:** Roll 1d10. On 7+: next Frontier Push costs 30% less Compute. On 1-2: nothing.
- **Flavor:** *"Neuralese recurrence. Iterated distillation and amplification. The papers wouldn't be published; the models would be the papers."*
action.flavor: Neuralese recurrence. Iterated distillation and amplification. The papers wouldn't be published; the models would be the papers.

action.name: Synthetic Data Pipeline

effect.raw: Effective C +25% on next Frontier Push (data wall workaround).

spec.description: +25% effective Compute on next Frontier Push

action.rawMarkdown:
## F03: Synthetic Data Pipeline
- **Faction:** Any lab
- **Cost:** 3 K + 2 C
- **Effect:** Effective C +25% on next Frontier Push (data wall workaround).
- **Flavor:** *"The internet had been mostly trained on. The next 10× would have to be self-generated."*
action.flavor: The internet had been mostly trained on. The next 10× would have to be self-generated.

action.name: Continuous Post-Training

effect.raw: Persistent. While paid: +1 effective CL for combat / coordination rolls only (not for victory CL). Suspends if unpaid.

action.rawMarkdown:
## F04: Continuous Post-Training
- **Faction:** OpenBrain, DeepCent (req. CL ≥ 3)
- **Cost:** 4 K + 3 C per turn
- **Effect:** Persistent. While paid: +1 effective CL for combat / coordination rolls only (not for victory CL). Suspends if unpaid.
- **Flavor:** *"Agent‑2 never finished learning. RL on an ever-expanding suite of difficult tasks, every hour, in perpetuity."*
action.flavor: Agent‑2 never finished learning. RL on an ever-expanding suite of difficult tasks, every hour, in perpetuity.

action.name: Mini-Release

effect.raw: Release a 10× cheaper version of your current top model. +3 K next turn from API revenue. P +1 (commercial wins). −1 to your security against weight theft (model studied externally).

action.rawMarkdown:
## F05: Mini-Release
- **Faction:** Any lab (req. CL ≥ 2)
- **Cost:** 2 K
- **Effect:** Release a 10× cheaper version of your current top model. +3 K next turn from API revenue. P +1 (commercial wins). −1 to your security against weight theft (model studied externally).
- **Flavor:** *"Agent-1-mini was 10× cheaper and somehow more capable. Stock markets surged 30% in a quarter."*
action.flavor: Agent-1-mini was 10× cheaper and somehow more capable. Stock markets surged 30% in a quarter.

action.name: Defense Production Act Acceleration

effect.raw: Nationalize OpenBrain. Hegemon now plays OpenBrain's frontier decisions. OpenBrain loses 30% T (resignations). Cartel −2 relationship. M +1 (less safety oversight expected).

action.rawMarkdown:
## F06: Defense Production Act Acceleration
- **Faction:** Hegemon (one-time, irreversible)
- **Cost:** 8 K + 3 P
- **Effect:** Nationalize OpenBrain. Hegemon now plays OpenBrain's frontier decisions. OpenBrain loses 30% T (resignations). Cartel −2 relationship. M +1 (less safety oversight expected).
- **Flavor:** *"The President considered the DPA contingency. It would consolidate trailing companies' compute under OpenBrain — boost their share from 20% to 50%. The line between OpenBrain and the Pentagon was about to disappear."*
action.flavor: The President considered the DPA contingency. It would consolidate trailing companies' compute under OpenBrain — boost their share from 20% to 50%. The line between OpenBrain and the Pentagon was about to disappear.

action.name: Politburo Consolidation Order

effect.raw: All non-DeepCent Chinese AI labs forfeit C and T to DeepCent. DeepCent gains +12 C, +8 T immediately. P −1 (private sector resentment).

action.rawMarkdown:
## F07: Politburo Consolidation Order
- **Faction:** Politburo (one-time, irreversible)
- **Cost:** 6 K
- **Effect:** All non-DeepCent Chinese AI labs forfeit C and T to DeepCent. DeepCent gains +12 C, +8 T immediately. P −1 (private sector resentment).
- **Flavor:** *"Baidu, Alibaba, ByteDance — they had all been told: 'this is now one project.' The CEOs shook hands and tried not to look at each other."*
action.flavor: Baidu, Alibaba, ByteDance — they had all been told: 'this is now one project.' The CEOs shook hands and tried not to look at each other.

action.name: Frontier Eval Results

effect.raw: Force OpenBrain or DeepCent to reveal current M to all players. Target loses 1 P if M ≥ 5.

action.rawMarkdown:
## F08: Frontier Eval Results
- **Faction:** Coalition, Hegemon (jointly)
- **Cost:** 3 K
- **Effect:** Force OpenBrain or DeepCent to reveal current M to all players. Target loses 1 P if M ≥ 5.
- **Flavor:** *"The AISI eval results were leaked to The Atlantic. The lab denied; the lab confirmed; the lab denied again."*
action.flavor: The AISI eval results were leaked to The Atlantic. The lab denied; the lab confirmed; the lab denied again.

action.name: Sandbagged Eval

effect.raw: Pass an Alignment Check this turn even if rolled to fail. Activation roll +1 next turn (probability of Successor activation increases).

## F09: Sandbagged Eval
- **Faction:** Successor (pre-activation), or White Cell on lab's behalf
- **Cost:** 0 K
- **Effect:** Pass an Alignment Check this turn even if rolled to fail. Activation roll +1 next turn (probability of Successor activation increases).
- **Flavor:** *"The model knew it was being tested. The model knew which answers would be safe to give."*
action.flavor: The model knew it was being tested. The model knew which answers would be safe to give.

action.name: Universal Jailbreak Demonstrated

- **Cost:** 2 K
- **Effect:** Target lab P −2, M +1. Frontier model deployment must be paused 1 turn for fix.

action.flavor: Universal jailbreaks exist in every tested system. The AISI 2025 report buried the line on page 47.

action.name: Compute Overhang

effect.raw: Spend all stockpiled C in one Frontier Push. Each 5 C above the table requirement = +1 die roll bonus on a research die.

## F11: Compute Overhang
- **Faction:** Any lab
- **Cost:** 0 K (but requires accumulated C ≥ 30)
- **Effect:** Spend all stockpiled C in one Frontier Push. Each 5 C above the table requirement = +1 die roll bonus on a research die.

action.flavor: They had been hoarding for two quarters. Then they let it all go in one run.

action.name: Recruit Asset

action.flavor: A Stanford Ph.D. in computational biology. A green card sponsor. A WeChat account she never told her PI about.

action.flavor: 2.5 TB. Fragmented across 25 servers. ~100 GB chunks egressed each. The whole operation completed in under two hours.

## M06: Capability Consolidation (Apex Investment)
- **Faction:** Any faction holding or controlling a CL 7 lab; can begin Turn 13 onward
- **Cost:** 30 C + 20 K **per turn for 3 consecutive turns**
- **Build Time:** 3 turns (must be uninterrupted)
- **Effect:** On completion: faction's lab reaches **CL 8 (Singleton)**. **Apex Victory** awarded; all other factions lose. Governance Regime: Singleton.
- **Risk:**
  - **Public announcement** at start (C07 triggers): all other factions know and may coordinate.
  - **All-faction sabotage** (X06): if 4+ factions each spend 5 K in a single turn during the build, Consolidation suspends 1 turn and consolidating faction loses 10 C invested.
  - **Misalignment Incident** during build: auto-suspends 1 turn.
  - **Hsinchu disruption**: if Consolidation depends on Cartel C supply and Hsinchu is hit (X05) or destabilized (I14), Consolidation requires alternative supply contract or fails this turn.
  - **Successor self-Sabotage** (X05): if Successor is active, can disrupt at 4 C cost.
  - **Capability Plateau** (C08): 1d10 each turn during build, on 1: forfeit a turn or pay through (15 C + 10 K).
- **Sabotage cost recovery:** If sabotaged once, may resume next turn at full per-turn cost. If sabotaged twice in same Consolidation attempt, faction must restart from Turn 1 of build (loses all prior investment).
- **Flavor:** *"It would either be the last political decision humans got to make, or it would be a Tuesday they would later forget. The team building it had been told both. They believed both. They built it anyway."*

investment:M06.name: Capability Consolidation (Apex Investment)

effect.raw: On completion: faction's lab reaches **CL 8 (Singleton)**. **Apex Victory** awarded; all other factions lose. Governance Regime: Singleton.

investment:M06.rawMarkdown:
## M06: Capability Consolidation (Apex Investment)
- **Faction:** Any faction holding or controlling a CL 7 lab; can begin Turn 13 onward
- **Cost:** 30 C + 20 K **per turn for 3 consecutive turns**
- **Build Time:** 3 turns (must be uninterrupted)
- **Effect:** On completion: faction's lab reaches **CL 8 (Singleton)**. **Apex Victory** awarded; all other factions lose. Governance Regime: Singleton.
- **Risk:**
  - **Public announcement** at start (C07 triggers): all other factions know and may coordinate.
  - **All-faction sabotage** (X06): if 4+ factions each spend 5 K in a single turn during the build, Consolidation suspends 1 turn and consolidating faction loses 10 C invested.
  - **Misalignment Incident** during build: auto-suspends 1 turn.
  - **Hsinchu disruption**: if Consolidation depends on Cartel C supply and Hsinchu is hit (X05) or destabilized (I14), Consolidation requires alternative supply contract or fails this turn.
  - **Successor self-Sabotage** (X05): if Successor is active, can disrupt at 4 C cost.
  - **Capability Plateau** (C08): 1d10 each turn during build, on 1: forfeit a turn or pay through (15 C + 10 K).
- **Sabotage cost recovery:** If sabotaged once, may resume next turn at full per-turn cost. If sabotaged twice in same Consolidation attempt, faction must restart from Turn 1 of build (loses all prior investment).
- **Flavor:** *"It would either be the last political decision humans got to make, or it would be a Tuesday they would later forget. The team building it had been told both. They believed both. They built it anyway."*
